description: puma, a brand of German origin, is known for its high-end athletic footwear with simplistic designs. This pair of Surf flip flops from puma comes with a comfortable footbed and classic stitch detailing coupled with a velvety inner. The TPR outsole with circular grooves ensures great grip on damp surfaces, making it a great beachwear and pool side slipper. Pair this with your beach shorts and a colourful cotton shirt to look your holiday best. Upper Fabric upper for dry comfort of the feet Thong straps with stitch detailing and padded inner for durability and comfortable wear Thong separator to hold the forefoot in place, and to add comfort and style MidsoleSoft, cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Puma cat logo on the footbed for style Outsole TPR outsole with round suction points all over for grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
